snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 82 Teaser - 14th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 82 Teaser - 14th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Har Pal Geo is now in the USA! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to continue enjoining your favorite Pakistani dramas

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad’s relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad’s life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad’s countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Agha Ali
Nimra Khan
Yashma Gill
Sajida Syed
Gul E Rana
Seemi Pasha
Saleem Mairaj

Shaharyar Ghazali

Mubasira Khanum

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher

Composer: Naveed Nashad

Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?

Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: Pakistan: Protesters block Karachi road over arrest of TLP party chief
snippet.description:
Subscribe to our channel! rupt.ly/subscribe

Police fired tear gas and arrested protesters after they blocked a Karachi road over the detention of Tehreek-i-Labbaik Pakistan (TLP) party chief on Tuesday.

Members and supporters of TLP blocked roads in Pakistan's major cities on the second day of protests after TLP leader Allama Saad Hussain Rizvi was arrested.

Rizvi was arrested as a precautionary measure ahead of the party's April 20 deadline for the Pakistan government for a set of measures it had demanded in response to 'blasphemous' caricatures published in France last year.

Tehreek-i-Labbaik Pakistan had demanded a ban on French products and had asked Islamabad to expel the French ambassador.
#Karachi #Pakistan #Rizvi 

    Video on Demand: https://ruptly.tv/videos/20210413-029
    Contact: cd@ruptly.tv    

    Twitter: http://twitter.com/Ruptly
    Facebook: http://www.facebook.com/Ruptly

snippet.title: Strange Riddle Behind The Little One | C.I.D | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

An Incident of a little one has created an enigma around CID Team. While searching for the family members, they relate the story with problematic twists and turns. Who is this child? Where did she come from? What is the mystery of her family? Will Team CID be able to solve this case and find the Puzzle? Watch now, To know more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
snippet.description:
Hafiz Tahir Qadri | New Ramzan Kalam 2021 | Mujhko Ramzan ka Mahina
------------------------------------
Connect with HafizTahirQadri: 👉 http://bit.ly/HafizTahirQadri​
Record Label: *Hafiz Tahir Qadri * 
Credits:-
------------------------------------
Naatkhuwan : 
Hafiz Tahir Qadri 
Hafiz Ahsan Qadri 
Son of Hafiz Tahir Qadri ( Muhammad Hanzal Qadri and Muhammad Hamza Qadri )
Audio: Rao Wassay (RWDS)
Composition :
Hafiz Tahir Qadri 
Poet: Allama Nisar Ali Ujagar
DOP: Syed Bilal Sani 
Edit & Post: Taha Qadri
------------------------------------------------
Aya ALLAH ka mehman 
Aya he Maah e Ramzan 
Le kar hathon mei Quraan
Aya he maah e ramzan 

Rahmat e Ramzan Rahmat e Ramzan 
Rahmat e Ramzan
Rahmat e Ramzan

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he 

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga
Rahman raazi hoga Rahman raazi hoga

Dekho flak pe chand chamka maah e ramzaa aya 
Nikhra nikhra har ek chehra maah e ramzaa aya

Pure maheenay roze rakhna acha lagta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Bacho roza rakhna he qurb khuda ka paana he 
Raazi hota he REHMAAN aya he maah e ramzan 

Ramzaa mei momin k muqaddar roshan lagte hein
Masjid k mehraab o mimbar roshan lagte hein

Masjid mei logon ka barhna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Ramzan k roze rkhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Ramzan k roze rakhunga 
Main sari namazen prhunga
Quraan ki tilawat karunga 
Or deen ki baten seekhunga 

Rab ki Rahmat ghar ghar utri aya he mehmaan 

mazy mazy ki khushbu pheli Saje hein dastar khuwan

Iftaari mei mil kar khana acha lgta he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka mheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Gunbad e khazra k saye mei ham sab bethe houn
Dastar khuwan saja ho lab par un ki naatain houn 

Taiba mei Iftaari karna Acha lagta he he

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Nafraton ko chor k tote dilon ko jour k maah e ramzaa ki barkat se ek banna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Rishwat lena or dena soud pe Business q karna maah e ramzaa ki barkat s bachte rehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Gheebat or chughal khori neiki se he ghaddari 
Maah e ramzaa ki barkat se sach hi kehna he 

Mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he mujhe neik banna he 

Ashra e rahmat ashra e bakhshish naar se azaadi 
Maang ujagar apni
bakhshish ban ja faryaadi 

Rab se duaen krte rehna acha lagta he 

Mujhko Ramzaa ka maheena acha lagta he 
Sahri o Iftaar krna acha lgta he

"Rahmat e ramzaan"
------------------------------------------------
Official Facebook page : https://www.facebook.com/HafizTahirQadri/

#MujhkoRamzanKaMahina​ #HafizTahirQadri​ #RamzanSpecialNasheed​ #Prophet​ #Quran​ #nasheed​ #ramadan2021​ #arabic​ #arabicnasheed​ #naat​ #naatcream​ #vocals​ #islamicnasheed​ #muslims​ #ramzan​ #ramzan2021​ #rehmateramzan​ #iftar​ #sehri​ #muslimworld

snippet.title: Babar Azam hits first T20I Century againts South Africa 3rd T20I Match|वनइंडिया हिंदी
snippet.description:
साउथ अफ्रीका के खिलाफ शानदार बल्लेबाजी करने वाले बाबर आजम को इनाम मिला. और वो कोहली को हटाकर दुनिया के नंबर वन वनडे बल्लेबाज बने. इसके बाद साउथ अफ्रीका के खिलाफ तीसरे टी20 मुकाबले में बाबर आजम ने महज 49 गेंदों का सामना करते हुए शतक लगा दिया. बाबर आजम का ये पहला इंटरनेशनल टी20 शतक है. उन्होंने 59 गेंदों का सामना करते हुए 122 रनों की पारी खेली. इस दौरान बाबर आजम ने 15 चौके और चार छक्के भी लगाए. जबकि स्ट्राइक रेट बाबर आजम को 206 का रहा. इस शतक के साथ बाबर आजम ने कई बड़े रिकॉर्ड बना दिए हैं. वो पाकिस्तान के तीसरे बल्लेबाज बने जिन्होंने टी20 इंटरनेशनल में शतक लगाया है. इससे पहले साथी खिलाड़ी मोहम्मद रिजवान और अहमद शहजाद ने शतक लगाया था. बाबर आजम पाकिस्तान के पहले कप्तान भी बने. जिन्होंने टी20 में शतक लगाया है.

Azam got to his first T20I hundred off just 49 balls, two days after he took 50 balls to score as many runs, smashing 15 boundaries and four sixes along the way. It was a shame he would be dismissed seven runs shy of the target, but by then, Azam had romped to 122 off just 59 deliveries in one of the all-time great T20 innings. Before the game, Rameez Raja asked Pakistan captain Babar Azam why Fakhar Zaman wasn't slated to open the batting for Pakistan. But in 18 record-breaking overs, Azam and Mohammad Rizwan provided the perfect answer, pummelling South Africa into submission as they chased down 204 at a canter in winning the third T20I in Centurion by nine wickets.

#BabarAzam   #MohammedRizwan   #PAKvsSA 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Proton Saga 2021 | Pakistan ki sab say sassti sedan | First Look Review
snippet.description:
Proton Pakistan has finally launched the much-awaited sedan, Proton Saga, in a digital launch event. Saga is Proton’s second car in Pakistan, after Proton X70. Al-Haj Proton has introduced the Saga sedan in three variants, Standard MT (Manual Transmission), Standard AT (Auto Transmission), and Ace AT (Auto Transmission). An interesting part of Saga’s launch in Pakistan is that Al-Haj Motors has also introduced a Sports variant of the car but in a limited edition. This variant is called R3 for ‘Race, Rally, and Research’ to give Pakistanis a taste of Proton’s motorsports vehicles. Here's the first look review of Proton Saga, enjoy the video and tell us about the car in the comments.

Sehri ka dastar khawan Iftar ki woh shan
Allah ka hai ehsan Ramzan Meharban

Ramzan Meharban

Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Siyam
Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Ghufran
Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Ramzan

Fazle maula se bhari hai har ghari Ramzan ki
Shukar hai rab ka phir mili Khushi Ramzan ki

Sab masalmanon ke ghar ki barkaten rozey se hai
Asi bandon par khuda ki rehmaten rozey se hai

Masjidon ki ronaqon ko dekh kar lagta hai ye
Paak badon ki haseen ye mehfilen rozey se hai

Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Marhaba

Dosrey aur teesrey mein bi hai fazle be hisaab

Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Marhaba
Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Siyam
Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Ghufran
Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Ramzan

Dagh isya ke hamarey rab ki rehmaten dullen
Har daroodon ka ittar apni zabanon par malen
Qasrat e tauba se razi apne rab ko bi karen

Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Siyam

Marhaba Marhaba, Marhaba Mahe Ramzan

snippet.title: Best Of CID | सीआईडी | Bank Robbery | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlistlist=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 There is an unsolved bank robbery case where diamonds worth crores was looted and the mastermind escapes with the loot leaving behind five of his accomplices high and dry. Six years later this mysterious man comes back to the city and the five accomplices who were waiting for him  decide to strike. Their plans go haywire and an innocent man gets attacked. How did the innocent man die? More importantly why did the mastermind who had escaped after the robbery come back to the city?

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

More Useful Links :

snippet.description:
🎵🎵Watch the official music video of Asim Azhar's latest single featuring Talha Anjum & Talhah Yunus! 

#YAAD - #AsimAzhar | #YoungStunners | #TalhaAnjum | #TalhahYunus (Official Music Video)

🎵Get the full song! https://backl.ink/145875896

🎵Spotify: http://open.spotify.com/album/3QGrCo6L9djVTKvmFTvQPq

🎵iTunes: https://geo.itunes.apple.com/WebObjects/MZSearch.woa/wa/advancedSearch?allTitle=Yaad&entity=album&media=all&submit=seeAllLockups&at=1l3v9Tx

🎵Bajao: https://bajao.pk/lnk/Bsoit

Lyrics:
Asim:
Tu ye jaane tere aage majboor hain
Kis baat ka gharoor 
Faida uthai ye
Kaisa ye suroor 

Deta saadayen kyun na tujhko sunai de
Tera dewana puri dunya gawai de
Mai laparwa sar phira par bewafa nae
Kab tak ye ashiq akhir apni safai de

Tu haan kar kabhi
Mai badlu abhi
Hai meri museebat ye tera zameer
Chehra asal tu apna dikhaye jaye
Kyun phir mujhko satayi jaye

Teri bas yaad yaad yaad
Aye mujhe baar baar baar
Sone na de
Jeena na de
Aur kisi ka hone na de

Talha Anjum:
Mein bola i’m going home but,
Asal mein I’m going crazy, 
Double black for the pain,
Rollie rollie got me faded, 
You played me, haan theek hai,
I’ll be over you by the weekend,
Been in the game for 10,
Kalla mere dil ke kitni qareeb hai,
Guzaari hai gurbat mein raatein, 
Kitaabo mein milni nai baatein,
Anay walay atay ho ge,
Mujhay unki fikar hai jo nahi atay, 
Tere bin eid nai eid, chehra nai qaabil e deed,
Chehray pe fikar hai wazeh, tu chehray ko parhna tou seekh, 

Tu mujhko raastay de, mein tujhko badlay mein faaslay du,
Tu mujhko aasre de, mein dil ki tijori se raaz aik du,
Chahay phir saans lein, tere deedar aur maut qubool, 
Karu qurban tujhpe ye zindagi tou hogi har saans wusool,

Mein badlu tou banu phir kya, Kya!
Ke Tu mera ho ke bhi na
Got everything that i need, give you anything that you want, 
Yeah i smoke trees, write songs,
Teri soch, all night long,
I could right all my wrongs,
But you’re gone and..

Talhah Yunus:
Raat ye sonay k liye magar hum soye nahi,
Karwat badalte rehte sochon mai hum khoye rahay,
Yaadon k bastay liye. ankhon ko bhigoyen nai,
Khud pe ye fakhar, woh mere jaane pe roye nai,
Yaar deewar bane, Rishton mai daraar dalay,
Guzre kia saal baray, Ghum on’ k pahaar banay,
Sab ki zabaan banen, Dil ye mazaar bane,
Aa na darbaar mere, likhte raat k chaar baje,
Lafzon k taajir, hum hijrat o hijr k aadi, barsa den ye baadal,
Zamane se pucho hum kitne bahadur, wo aj bhi samjhen humein pagal,
Khud dhunden jawaab, Kiu puchu sawaal, meri kia majaal?
Vehmo gumaan, Kia du mai misaal? Tu hai bemisaaal,
Har basti ujaagar,
Hum shab k musaafir, safar bhi mutaasir,
Mai Urdu ka Rakim, nazar bari qaatil,
Hustle meri wazeh, gawah mera Asim,
Mai dunya se ajiz, likh raha teri khaatir,
Raaten ye dhalti nahi,
Waqt ki tarah kyun badalti rahi,
Maanengay woh apni ghalti nahi,
Mai aaj bhi wuhi, koi jaldi nahi...

Song Credits:
♫Music Composer: Asim Azhar
♫Rap Part Composed by: Young Stunners
♫Music Produced by: Nafeel Ali
♫Co-Producer: Mo Khan
♫Lyrics: Asim Azhar, Talha Anjum, Talhah Yunus & Raamis Ali
♫Guitars by: Dilawar Hussain
♫Mixed by: Mo Khan
♫Mastered by: Andy Walter from Abbey Road
♫Rap Vocals Mixed by: Jokhay
♫Recorded at: Kazman Productions

Mikaal Zulfiqar, Sanam Jung, Muneeb Butt, Rabab Hashim, Ali Safina, Seemi Pasha, Waseem Abbas, Ramsha Salahuddin & Others.

Writer: Aliya Bukhari

Director: Barkat Sidiki

Producer: MD Productions

#Qarar #HUMTV #PriceMeter #MikaalZulfiqar #SanamJung #MuneebButt #RababHashim #AliSafina #SeemiPasha #WaseemAbbas #Drama

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​

snippet.title: Baalveer Returns - Ep 334 - Full Episode - 2nd April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 334: Bhyamar and Ray surrender to Baalveer
--------------------------------------------------------
Bhyamar and Ray have surrendered to Balveer but Vivan feels that Baalveer's life is in danger. So he and all the pari's go in search in of Baalveer watch the full episode to know more.

About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

snippet.title: Best Of CID | सीआईडी | Clustrophobia | Full Episode
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Watch More CID Episodes: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G0MM1QMSnGwbCTP8aU6oTz7
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A judge who happens to be ACP Pradyuman’s childhood friend, gets the shock of his life when he comes to know about his grandson’s kidnapping. The kidnappers want a judgment in their favour in return for the grandson. The judge refuses to comply but has very little time save his grandson. Will he crack and do what the criminals say in an attempt to save his grandson? 

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

More Useful Links :

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

snippet.title: Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 81 Teaser - 13th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai - Ep 81 Teaser - 13th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Hit the bell and subscribe to stay connected with Har Pal Geo's collection of Pakistani dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Mujhe Khuda Pay Yaqeen Hai is a story of a fight between good and evil that continues to exist since the beginning and till the end of the world. When the feelings of envy, hatred, and revenge come face to face with the pure and innocent feeling of love, the definite winner is truthfulness. This story is of a young woman, Rida who along with her husband, Hammad and two children live a blissful and happy life however welcoming Shakira and her daughter Nazneen as tenants proves to be the biggest mistake of their lives.
Consumed with a dark and secretive past, Shakira and Nazneen with their devious tricks soon begin to jeopardize Rida and Hammad’s relationship. Misunderstandings and delusions created by Shakira and Nazneen blur the bond between Hammad and Rida and their world comes crumbling down. With everything in Hammad’s life at stake, will he realize his mistakes? Will Shakira and Nazneen face the consequences of their actions? Even after Hammad’s countless mistakes and disloyalty towards Rida, will Rida be able to accept him?

Written By: Soofia Khurram
Directed By: Saleem Ghanchi
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

snippet.title: ICC ODI Ranking: वनडे में Virat Kohli की बादशाहत खत्म, Babar Azam बने नंबर-1 बल्लेबाज
snippet.description:
LIVE TV देखने के लिए इस लिंक पर क्लिक करें: https://www.tv9hindi.com/live-tv
ICC ने T20 की ताजा रैंकिंग जारी कर दी है. और इस नई रैकिंग में भारतीय कप्तान विराट कोहली (Virat Kohli) ने लंबी छलांग लगाते हुए बल्लेबाजों की लिस्ट में टॉप 5 में अपनी जगह बना ली है. हालांकि इस रैंकिग में एक बार फिर पाकिस्तान के बल्लेबाज बाबर आजम भारतीय बल्लबाजों पर भारी पड़े है..
जहां इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ T20 सीरीज (T-20 Series) में अब तक केएल राहुल का प्रदर्शन कुछ खास नहीं रहा है..जिसका खामियाजा उन्हें बल्लेबाजों की रैंकिंग में नीचे खिसककर उठाना पड़ा है..वहीं अब इसका फायदा पाकिस्तान के बल्लेबाज को मिला है
#ViratKohli #BabarAzam #ICCT20Ranking #KLRahul

snippet.title: Karachi Traffic Update BREAKING NEWS | Shadeed Traffic Jam .......!!!
snippet.description:
#breakingnews #breakingnews #trafficjam #protest #samaatv
read here : https://bit.ly/2Rw1gPV
I.I. Chundrigar Road, Tower, Garden, Kharadar, Hassan Square blocked

A massive traffic jam was reported on Karachi’s II Chundrigar Roadand several other areas due to protests by the workers of a religio-political party.

Other areas that are affected include Garden, Kharadar, Jail Chowrangi, Numaish, Orangi Town, Baldia Town Malir, Hassan Square and Malir.

 “Ghareeb ka daal roti kharab kar dia he,” said Ahmed, 69, rickshaw driver stuck at SM GOVT law college. 

Kya ho gaya? Karachi ko kya chand nazar aa gaya kya?” One guy said as he picked his way past motorcycles.

Karachi Traffic Police on Twitter said it is in part due to the protest by the paramedical staff at Sarwar Shaheed Road.

snippet.title: To Be Honest 2.0 | Mathira | Tabish Hashmi | Full Episode | Nashpati Prime
snippet.description:
Mathira Mohammad aka Mathira is a Pakistani model, dancer, television hostess, singer and actress. Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. snippet.title: Baalveer Returns Season 2 - Ep 336  - Full Episode - 6th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of Baalveer Returns: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Yx-rSymwv5NSIsaQ0RwDK_

Episode 336: Vivaan to fight Kaal
--------------------------------------------------------
 Shaurya asks Baalpari and Vivaan to protect the universe from Kaal.Shaurya then visits other universe to warn them about Kaal and how he will unleash his evil spirit. On the other side Happy is forced to pick up a fight with a wrestler who is double then his size to know more watch the full episode .
About Baalveer Returns:
---------------------------------------
After Pari-lok, the home of benevolent fairies was destroyed by a mighty evil, Timnasa. Baalveer takes shelter in Veer-lok along with a few Paris who had survived the massacre. There, under the guidance of the wise old white lion Shaurya, Baalveer and Pari's are instructed to find the successor of Baalveer at the earliest, since he was immensely injured during the war and will need to team up a new Baalveer to further fight the battle with evil. This search for the next Baalveer takes them to earth, where they discover Vivan, who lives in an old society of Mumbai. He is the naughtiest kid, an ardent fan of Salman Khan, and a non-believer of Baalveer and his powers. This adds to the misery of Baalveer because unfortunately, this undisciplined, non-believer kid is the real successor of Baalveer. What follows is the challenging journey of Baalveer and his team to make Vivaan the next Baalveer with some eccentric characters, childish games and lots of magic on earth and the respective loks, while the imminent threat of Timnasa and the mystery behind her origin continues to play a part.

snippet.title: The ICE (End of life). Buner vines new video 2021
snippet.description:
Side effects of ICE (METH HARM)

SHORT-TERM EFFECTS

Loss of appetite

Increased heart rate, blood pressure, body temperature

Dilation of pupils

Disturbed sleep patterns

Nausea

Bizarre, erratic, sometimes violent behavior

Hallucinations, hyperexcitability, irritability

Panic and psychosis

Convulsions, seizures and death from high doses

LONG-TERM EFFECTS

Permanent damage to blood vessels of heart and brain, high blood pressure leading to heart attacks, strokes and death

Liver, kidney and lung damage

Destruction of tissues in nose if sniffed

Respiratory (breathing) problems if smoked

Infectious diseases and abscesses if injected

Malnutrition, weight loss

Severe tooth decay

Disorientation, apathy, confused exhaustion

Strong psychological dependence

Psychosis

Depression
